**![][image1]**

# *`Concept`*

## Mission

### **🧠 Make it easy to find vetted Ugandan creators**

***A platform that provides independently verified profiles of Uganda’s multimedia professionals. Kelele Collective acts as a trusted intermediary, opening up our network to recommend the right creators for the job at hand. Proudly Ugandan.***

* Provide a trusted pathway to job recommendations  
* Offer unbiased, quality-based recommendations  
* Link the right producers with the right talent  
* Increase Job opportunities for creatives

## Key Questions

* Why are existing Platforms  (linkedin, artstation etc. not sufficient??)  
  	\> Trust problem, no vetting  
  	\> Creators not active enough on Linkedin  
* Where to limit? Multimedia only?

## The Problem We Solve

**Existing platforms like LinkedIn and ArtStation don't solve the trust problem. There's no vetting, creators aren't active enough on professional networks, and clients have no reliable way to assess quality or professionalism. Kelele bridges this gap.** 

## Add Knowledge & Ressources 

* Booking Tools  
* Contract templates  
* Help Users (Clients, Producers to write better briefings) \> Create pdf-briefing from filling a form…  
* Blog: Articles mirrored on Linkedin, Promote Podcast etc.

## Who is Kelele Collective

**Kelele Collective is on a mission to empower creatives to become successful professionals through community activities, trainings and mentorship.** 

We are home to the Multimedia Meetup, a physical event happening regularly in Kampala.

Kelele collective is a registered Non-Profit in Uganda and Switzerland, initiated by Tobias Fluck around 2022, an expat Motion Designer with a background in Design and Advertising based in Kampala.

Read more on [kelelecollective.org/hello](http://kelelecollective.org/hello)

## Vetting Framework

**"Kelele Verified"** is our quality mark. It signals that a creator has been reviewed and meets our standards for professional work.

## **Vetting Criteria**

| Stage | Criteria | What It Means | Evidence Required |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Authenticity, Legitimacy | works beeing made by the creator | Reverse search,3rd party confirmation |
| 2 | Portfolio Quality | Work samples meet professional standard | Minimum 3 relevant pieces |
| 2 | Skill Accuracy | Creator can do what they claim | Portfolio matches stated skills |
| 2 | Recency | Active and current work | Work from last 2 years (preferred) |
|  | Network Connection | Known to Kelele community | Bonus trust signal |

Scenarios

## **Scenarios**

| Evaluation | Way forward |
| :---- | :---- |
| Falsehoods | Reject, request proof,   |
| Originality in question (templates, copied etc.) | Reject, feedback |
| Quality of work substandard | Reject, feedback \> “Not yet” |
| Quality of work substandard **in one area** | Reject, let adjust the |
| Work  |  |
|  |  |
|  |  |
|  |  |
|  |  |

## **Profile/Application Statuses**

| Level | Description |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pending | Needs evaluation |  |
| Rejected soft | Minor flaws | Minor Updates required |
| Rejected hard | Major flaws.Substandard | Feedback, Re-evaluation pending for  3 months |
| Verified Emerging | “Yung Guns” | Promising Talent, give a chance on the plattform, labeled as “Emerging” |
| Verified |  | Yearly reminder to keep profile updated \+ Survey for feedbacks |
|  |  |  |

| Level | Description | Typical Signals |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Young gun \- Emerging | Some promising work, limited client experience |
| 3 | Expert | Exceptional work, known reputation, complex projects |
|  |  |  |

**Quality / Evaluation**

**We DON’T pit creatives agains each other on the platform** (like in the form of a ranking). The philosophy is more about finding the RIGHT provider for our finders projects, rather then the absolute best in the whole country.

Optional datapoints beside can be considered:

## **Levels**

## **Review Process**

**Phase 1:** Tobi reviews all applications using the vetting checklist.

**Phase 2+:** Peer review system with additional expert reviewers to scale.

## **"Not Yet" Framework**

Rather than rejecting applicants who don't meet standards, we use a "Not Yet" approach that fits Kelele's mission of empowering creatives. This turns rejection into mentorship.

**When someone doesn't pass:**

1. Acknowledge their application and thank them  
2. Be specific about what's missing  
3. Give actionable next steps to improve  
4. Invite them to reapply in 3-6 months

   

## "Not Yet" Feedback Template

**Subject:** Your Kelele Collective Application

Hi \[Name\],

Thanks for applying to be listed on Kelele Collective—we're glad you want to be part of this.

After reviewing your profile, we're not able to verify you just yet. Here's why:

**What's missing:** \[Select/edit as needed\]

* We'd need to see more work samples (minimum 3 pieces)  
* Your samples don't clearly demonstrate \[skill they claimed\]  
* We'd like to see more recent work (ideally from the last 2 years)  
* The work isn't quite at the quality level we're verifying for yet

**What would help:** \[Add 1-2 specific suggestions\]

* Example: "Stronger examples of motion graphics with more complex animation"  
* Example: "A short film or commercial project that shows your cinematography range"

This isn't a "no"—it's a "not yet." You're welcome to reapply in 3-6 months with updated work. In the meantime, keep creating.

\[Optional: If you'd like feedback or mentorship, join us at our next Multimedia Meetup—details at kelelecollective.org.\]

Best,\[Tobi / Kelele Collective\]

## Profiles

**Visuals**: Images, Videos embedded

**Personal:** Full Name, Artist Name, Contact, Location, own Company (Founder, or co-Founder)

**Links:** to PDFs, Websites and Social Channels (External)

**Skills (Disciplines):** Main Skill – Several Side Skills possible (cap of 3?)

**Experience:** In Years per skill:     
(this can act as a price-range indication)

**Specialities:** Content Creation, Film/TV, Music Industry, Advertising, Fashion, Art, Gaming, Comic, Editorial, Architecture, Documentary, Educational, Media for Kids      (up to 5?)

**Software:** List of Applications (keep compact in Profile)

**Services: “**What I offer” (AS A TEXTFIELD) Freelaning, Gigwork, Production-Management, Ideation and consulting, Event-Films complete with Audio Production

**~~Certificates/Schools:~~**  ~~We don’t beleive in certificates for creatives~~

**(( Mamybees…**

**Clients I have worked for:**    how to vett?

\>\> Individuals vs. companies?  // Single Freelancer or Production Team  ))

### **Skills  \>\>  See Onboarding**

## ---

## Budget / Financing?

Monetisation Options:

- Sponsored: Grant/Sponsorship to develop – and keep platform free  
- Subscription (not so good, cause not reocurring clients)  
- Freemium: Paywall for certain information (unlock for 1 month at a time)  
- Comission: Pay for sucessful recommendations

---

- Stories on Linkedin  
- Whatsapp and Faceboook Groups for Expads like KLA Remainers etc.  
-   
- Campaign Ideas around Game-Character Score Cards  
- Testimonials from Producers/Clients  
- Walk-trough-screen-vids

# *`Development`*

### **Creator Profiles (Ideas)**

**Mininmal**     \>\> Profile Categories/Wireframe below

* Work samples / visuals  
* Company Name option  
* Profile Pictures  
* Main Category/Skill, Side Skills

**??**

* How to automate Visual representation Link to portfolio free sites?  
  * Artlink, Behance, Shared Google Folder, Youtube, Integration of Linkedin-Elemets? (Certificates)  
  * Akatuuti

**Nice / Ideas**

* Make a VERIFIED-Label,   
* Price-point Indicator (per skill?),  
* Fun generated avatars when profile pic is missing  
* Software Skills (\> pretty hard to vet)  
* Software categories with individual levels  
* Level Indicator for each Skill seperately  
* Certificates, Education  
* Localisation  
* Automated Email- / whatsapp-campaig to keep profiles updated

## **Onboarding Creators**

* Problem: Time to capture manually  
* Automate Profile capturing  
* Taking People by the hand when filling their profile \> Guide with Examples etc.  
* How to keep up to date: Email with automated call to update to all in data-base

**Nice / Ideas**

* Let Artists capture their information through form

### **Searcher Accounts \= User**

**Mininmal**   \>\> not for first stage

**Nice / Ideas**

* Create Favourites-Lists  
* Anonymous Evaluations / Feedbacks  
* Offer custom recommendations

## 

## ---

### **Filter / Search / Categories**

**Main Skill Categories (Profile can have one Main skill (up to 3 side skills**

* Photography  
* Cinematography  
* Editing  
* Illustration  
* 2D Animation  
* 3D Animation  
* Motion Design  
* Graphic Design Print  
* Graphic Design Online  
* Programming  
* Producing  
* Writing  
* Art direction  
* Scenography

Skill Level  
Software

* Level 0 \- 3  
* 0 \= First timer  
* 1 \= Beginner  
* 2 \= Intermediete  
* 3 \= Pro

Experience?  (needs to be vetted)

- Former clients, Size of budgets, Years of experience

---

# *`Progress & Todo`*

### **Dev-Stages**

**Phase 1 –  Proof of Concept**

- Finalize Concept paper and vetting criteria  
- Define Categories and profile-needs  
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL database)Database in Sheets \+ Folders?  
- Manual onboarding processIntegrate visuals (automated or manualmaual?)  
- Somewhat manual onboardingonbording  
- 50 creatives onboarded  
- MVP: Database, Profiles, Filter, Basic Onboarding

**Phase 2 – Build out** 

- Fundraising: Find a grant  
- Start search via custom form (step-by-step process)  
- Automation of onboarding  
- Peer review system  
- Scale to 500 creatives

**Phase 3 – Refine and Scale**

- Enhanced interface  
- User accounts with favorites and history  
- Monetization implementation

- [ ] Intergrate work samples

---

### **Technical Architecture**

**Backend:** Supabase (PostgreSQL) — provides database, admin UI, CSV export, and API for the frontend.

## **Database Schema**

### **creators**

Main profile information for each creative.

| Column | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| id | uuid | Primary key |
| name | text | Full name |
| email | text | Private — admin/clients only |
| phone | text | Private — admin/clients only |
| company\_name | text | Optional, public |
| profile\_photo\_url | text | Public |
| bio | text | Short description, public |
| location | text | City/area, public |
| price\_range | text | "budget", "mid", "premium" |
| portfolio\_behance | text | Optional |
| portfolio\_youtube | text | Optional |
| portfolio\_instagram | text | Optional |
| portfolio\_linkedin | text | Optional |
| portfolio\_website | text | Optional |
| portfolio\_other | text | Catch-all for other links |
| is\_public | boolean | Show on directory after vetting |
| created\_at | timestamp | When they applied |
| updated\_at | timestamp | Last profile update |

### **creator\_skills**

Links creators to their skills (one main, up to 3 side skills).

| Column | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| id | uuid | Primary key |
| creator\_id | uuid | Foreign key → creators |
| skill | text | From skills\_list |
| is\_primary | boolean | Main skill \= true |
| level | int | 1 (Emerging), 2 (Competent), 3 (Expert) |

### **vetting**

Tracks review status for each creator.

| Column | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| id | uuid | Primary key |
| creator\_id | uuid | Foreign key → creators |
| status | text | "pending", "verified", "not\_yet" |
| reviewer | text | Who reviewed |
| reviewed\_at | timestamp | When reviewed |
| notes | text | Internal feedback |
| reapply\_after | date | For "not\_yet" cases |

### **portfolio\_items**

Individual work samples linked to a creator.

| Column | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| id | uuid | Primary key |
| creator\_id | uuid | Foreign key → creators |
| title | text | Project name |
| url | text | Link to work |
| thumbnail\_url | text | Preview image |
| skill | text | Which skill this demonstrates |

### **skills\_list**

Reference table of available skill categories.

| Column | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| id | uuid | Primary key |
| name | text | e.g. "Photography", "Motion Design" |
| is\_active | boolean | Can disable without deleting |

## **Data Privacy**

* **Private fields** (email, phone): Only visible to admins and logged-in clients  
* **Public fields:** Visible on directory after creator is verified and is\_public \= true  
* **Vetting notes:** Internal only, never shown to creators or clients


---

# *`User Stories`*

## **Creator**

| I want to... | So that... |
| :---- | :---- |
| Submit my profile with work samples | I can be considered for the directory |
| List my main skill and side skills | Clients find me for the right jobs |
| Add links to my portfolio platforms | Clients can see more of my work |
| Indicate my price range | I attract clients with matching budgets |
| Get clear feedback if not approved | I know how to improve and reapply |
| Update my profile when I have new work | My listing stays current |

## **Client – “Finder”**

| I want to... | So that... |
| :---- | :---- |
| Filter creators by skill category | I find people with the right expertise |
| Filter by skill level | I match project complexity to experience |
| Filter by price range | I find creators within my budget |
| View a creator's work samples | I can assess quality before reaching out |
| See portfolio links (Behance, YouTube, etc.) | I can explore their full body of work |
| Get contact info for verified creators | I can reach out directly |

## **Admin**

| I want to... | So that... |
| :---- | :---- |
| See all pending applications | I can review new creators |
| Review portfolio samples | I can assess quality |
| Assign skill levels (1-3) | Clients can filter by experience |
| Mark creators as "verified" or "not yet" | Only vetted profiles go public |
| Add internal notes on each creator | I remember context for future reviews |
| Export creator data to spreadsheet | I can analyze or share offline |
| Set a reapply date for "not yet" creators | I can track when to follow up |

#
